title: My Songs My Stories
summary: Last year, he won Best Flute CD at the Aboriginal People’s Choice Music Awards and Debut Artist of the Year at the Native American Music Awards. Flute player Ryan Little Eagle Molina now has a new album coming out called My Songs My Stories. http://72-56-1003-29.earthsongs.net/wp-content/uploads/201...

title: Desiree Dorian
summary: First Nations country singer Desiree Dorion speaks with us from Dauphin, Manitoba. She’s up for two Aboriginal Peoples Choice Music Awards this year: Songwriter of the Year and Single of the Year. On top of that, her album Small Town Storie … See More — with Desiree Dorion .
